description: Check app review status, read reviews, download sales reports from App Store Connect

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.pofky/appstore-connect-mcp

environmentVariables.description: App Store Connect API Key ID (10-char alphanumeric from ASC portal)
environmentVariables.name: ASC_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: App Store Connect Issuer ID (UUID from ASC portal)
environmentVariables.name: ASC_ISSUER_ID

environmentVariables.description: Path to .p8 private key file downloaded from App Store Connect
environmentVariables.name: ASC_PRIVATE_KEY_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Pro license key for reviews and sales tools (optional, get at buy.polar.sh)
environmentVariables.name: ASC_LICENSE_KEY
